message:
feat(abi-tests): expand malloc_abi test coverage with 7 new edge-case tests

- test_realloc_null_zero_size: verify realloc(NULL, 0) behaves like
  malloc(0) per C standard, freeing returned pointer if non-null
- test_malloc_free_cycles: stress-test 100 rapid malloc/free cycles to
  verify allocator stability under repeated allocation churn
- test_malloc_large_allocation: allocate 1MB, write sentinel bytes at
  first and last positions, verify data integrity before freeing
- test_calloc_large_zero_initialized: verify calloc(1, 4096) returns
  a fully zero-initialized 4096-byte buffer
- test_aligned_alloc_small_alignment: verify 8-byte alignment guarantee
  for aligned_alloc(8, 64)
- test_aligned_alloc_large_alignment: verify 4096-byte (page) alignment
  guarantee for aligned_alloc(4096, 8192)
- test_malloc_usable_size_after_realloc: verify malloc_usable_size
  reports >= 512 bytes after realloc from 64 to 512

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
